name: -V
--version
options.description: Output version of n

name: -h
--help
options.description: Display help information

name: -p
--preserve
options.description: Preserve npm and npx during install of Node.js

options.name: --no-preserve
options.description: Do not preserve npm and npx during install of Node.js

name: -q
--quiet
options.description: Disable curl output. Disable log messages processing "auto" and "engine" labels

name: -d
--download
options.description: Download only

name: -a
--arch
options.description: Override system architecture

options.name: --insecure
options.description: Turn off certificate checking for https requests (may be needed from behind a proxy server)

options.name: --use-xz
options.description: Override automatic detection of xz support and enable use of xz compressed node downloads

options.name: --no-use-xz
options.description: Override automatic detection of xz support and disable use of xz compressed node downloads

subcommands.name: prune
subcommands.description: Remove all cached Node.js versions except the installed version

subcommands.name: doctor
subcommands.description: Display diagnostics to help resolve problems

name: lsr
ls-remote
list-remote
subcommands.description: Output matching versions available for download

options.name: --all
options.description: Ls-remote displays all matches instead of last 20

name: which
bin
subcommands.description: Output path for downloaded node version

name: run
use
as
subcommands.description: Execute downloaded Node.js version with args

name: -e
--eval=...
options.description: Evaluate script

options.name: --watch
options.description: Watch input files

options.name: --watch-path
options.description: Specify a watch directory or file

options.name: --watch-preserve-output
options.description: Disable the clearing of the console when watch mode restarts the process

options.name: --env-file
options.description: Specify a file containing environment variables

name: -p
--print
options.description: Evaluate script and print result

name: -c
--check
options.description: Syntax check script without executing

name: -v
--version
options.description: Print Node.js version

name: -i
--interactive
options.description: Always enter the REPL even if stdin does not appear to be a terminal

name: -h
--help
options.description: Print node command line options (currently set)

options.name: --inspect
options.description: Activate inspector on host:port (default: 127.0.0.1:9229)

options.name: --preserve-symlinks
options.description: Follows symlinks to directories when examining source code and templates for translation strings

subcommands.name: exec
subcommands.description: Execute command with modified PATH, so downloaded node version and npm first
